prestazioni: AMG Performance ECU reflash for the M176 DE40 AL 4.0L V8 biturbo (stock: 422 HP, 610 Nm) targeting 550 HP and 750 Nm via Weistec Engineering Stage 2+ software, including optimized boost curves, revised ignition timing, and fueling maps for 98 RON fuel with methanol injection support (AEM 30-3300 controller + Snow Performance Boost Juice kit).

Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger upgrade (dual-ball bearing, 76mm compressor wheel, 62mm turbine) with custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipes (Supersprint) and 4-inch titanium exhaust system (Akrapović Evolution Line) featuring quad 100mm carbon-fiber tips and electronically controlled valves for cabin comfort.

Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilover suspension with G500-specific valving, 40mm front/30mm rear lowering, and adjustable rebound/compression damping (10 settings), paired with H&R 25mm front/20mm rear anti-roll bars and polyurethane bushings (Powerflex Black Series) for chassis rigidity.
estetica: RML Short Wheelbase (SWB) conversion kit, reducing the wheelbase by 12.5 inches (317mm) via custom subframe modifications and shortened driveshafts (G500-specific, not shared with G-Class Coupe), retaining full cabriolet functionality with reinforced A-pillars (Brabus 900 Widestar reinforcement plates).

Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (G500 Cabriolet-specific, not the G-Wagon variant) with carbon-fiber fenders (2.5-inch flares), custom aluminum rear quarter panels, and integrated LED turn signals (Lux H8 V4), paired with 22x10.5 ET15 front/22x12.5 ET20 rear forged wheels (BBS FI-R) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (295/30 R22 front, 325/25 R22 rear).

Full carbon-fiber hardtop replacement (Weistec W-Tronic) with electrochromic glass roof (SageGlass) for UV/heat rejection, featuring a removable rear section for open-air driving while retaining structural integrity, paired with a custom roll cage (Sparco Pro 2000) integrated into the B-pillars with Alcantara-wrapped padding (Egger-Green).
